name: the GCTP handoff names the full distributed system (SQL+NoSQL) and the 100% coverage verification
command: grep -q 'SQL + NoSQL' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/docs/handoff-gctp-composite-engine.md" && grep -q '100% file coverage' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/docs/handoff-gctp-composite-engine.md" && grep -q 'classify-path.sh' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/docs/handoff-gctp-composite-engine.md" && echo handoff-distributed-coverage 1>&2
